```{r setup, results="hide"}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = F, message = FALSE)
source("utils.R")
theme_set(theme_light())
```

```{r setup, results="hide"}
# ============================================================
# XGBoost (caret) training + evaluation pipeline (fixed)
# ============================================================

library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(glue)
library(pROC)
library(MLmetrics)
library(xgboost)

source("utils.R")

# -----------------------------
# Paths
# -----------------------------
input_folder  <- "data/paper2/split_models1725_0122/"
output_folder <- "output1725/result0122/xg1"

if (!dir.exists(output_folder)) {
  dir.create(output_folder, recursive = TRUE)
}

file_list <- list.files(path = input_folder, pattern = "\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)

# -----------------------------
# Feature list
# -----------------------------
selected_features <- c(
  "pair_id", "match",
  "metric_fname_dl", "metric_fname_jw", "metric_fname_soundex",
  "metric_lname_dl", "metric_lname_jw", "metric_lname_soundex",
  "metric_ffreq_a", "metric_ffreq_b",
  "metric_lfreq_a", "metric_lfreq_b",
  "metric_dob_dist", "metric_year_dist", "metric_month_dist", "metric_day_dist",
  "metric_dm_swaps", "birth_year_a", "birth_year_b",
  "metric_gender_code_ff", "metric_gender_code_mm",
  "metric_race_code_same", "metric_race_code_ww_bb",
  "metric_potential_marriage"
)

# -----------------------------
# Data cleaning
# -----------------------------
clean_data <- function(df_input) {
  df_input %>%
    select(all_of(selected_features)) %>%
    mutate(
      birth_year_a = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(birth_year_a)),
      birth_year_b = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(birth_year_b)),
      match = factor(match)
    )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# caret <-> xgboost compatibility patch (xgboost newer versions)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
xgbTree_fixed <- caret::getModelInfo("xgbTree", regex = FALSE)[[1]]

xgbTree_fixed$fit <- function(x, y, wts, param, lev, last, classProbs, ...) {
  if (!is.matrix(x)) x <- as.matrix(x)

  # convert factor to 0/1; positive class = lev[2]
  y_num <- if (is.factor(y)) as.numeric(y == lev[2]) else y

  dtrain <- xgboost::xgb.DMatrix(data = x, label = y_num, weight = wts)

  params <- list(
    booster = "gbtree",
    objective = "binary:logistic",
    eta = param$eta,
    max_depth = param$max_depth,
    gamma = param$gamma,
    colsample_bytree = param$colsample_bytree,
    min_child_weight = param$min_child_weight,
    subsample = param$subsample,
    eval_metric = "logloss"
  )

  bst <- xgboost::xgb.train(
    params = params,
    data = dtrain,
    nrounds = param$nrounds,
    verbose = 0
  )

  # Wrap booster so caret can attach metadata safely
  structure(
    list(model = bst, xNames = colnames(x), lev = lev),
    class = "caret_xgb_booster"
  )
}

xgbTree_fixed$predict <- function(modelFit, newdata, submodels = NULL) {
  if (!is.matrix(newdata)) newdata <- as.matrix(newdata)
  p <- predict(modelFit$model, newdata)
  factor(ifelse(p > 0.5, modelFit$lev[2], modelFit$lev[1]), levels = modelFit$lev)
}

xgbTree_fixed$prob <- function(modelFit, newdata, submodels = NULL) {
  if (!is.matrix(newdata)) newdata <- as.matrix(newdata)
  p <- predict(modelFit$model, newdata)

  # build probs with dynamic column names safely
  out <- data.frame(`__c1__` = 1 - p, `__c2__` = p)
  colnames(out) <- modelFit$lev
  out
}

# -----------------------------
# CV settings
# -----------------------------
train_control <- trainControl(
  method = "cv",
  number = 10,
  verboseIter = TRUE,
  savePredictions = TRUE,
  classProbs = TRUE
)

# -----------------------------
# Main loop
# -----------------------------
for (file_path in file_list) {
  file_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file_path))
  message(glue("Processing file: {file_name}"))

  df <- readr::read_rds(file_path)

  # ---- Train ----
  df_train <- clean_data(df$df_train) %>% as.data.frame()
  df_train$match <- factor(df_train$match)

  # Ensure binary
  if (nlevels(df_train$match) != 2) {
    stop(glue("{file_name}: match must be binary factor, got {nlevels(df_train$match)} levels."))
  }

  # Align test factor levels
  test_subsets <- purrr::map(df$test_subsets, ~ {
    tmp <- clean_data(.x) %>% as.data.frame()
    tmp$match <- factor(tmp$match, levels = levels(df_train$match))
    tmp
  })

  set.seed(13)
  message("Training XGBoost (patched caret model) ...")

  x_train <- df_train %>% dplyr::select(-match, -pair_id)
  y_train <- df_train$match

  model_xgb <- caret::train(
    x = x_train,
    y = y_train,
    method = xgbTree_fixed,
    metric = "Accuracy",
    preProcess = c("medianImpute"),
    trControl = train_control,
    tuneGrid = expand.grid(
      nrounds = 150,
      max_depth = c(3, 5, 7),
      eta = c(0.01, 0.1, 0.3),
      gamma = c(0, 1),
      colsample_bytree = c(0.6, 0.8),
      min_child_weight = c(1, 5),
      subsample = c(0.6, 0.8)
    )
  )

  saveRDS(model_xgb, glue("{output_folder}/{file_name}_xgb_trained.rds"))

  # ---- Evaluate ----
  xgb_results_all <- tibble(
    subset = integer(),
    metrics = list(),
    confusion_matrix = list(),
    roc_curve = list(),
    pred_confidence = list()
  )

  for (i in seq_along(test_subsets)) {
    test_set <- test_subsets[[i]]
    message(glue("Evaluating on Test Subset {i}"))

    result <- evaluate_model(model_xgb, df_test = test_set)

    xgb_results_all <- bind_rows(
      xgb_results_all,
      tibble(
        subset = i,
        metrics = list(result$metrics$df_metric_table),
        confusion_matrix = list(result$metrics$confusion_matrix),
        roc_curve = list(result$metrics$roc_curve),
        pred_confidence = list(result$confidence)
      )
    )
  }

  saveRDS(xgb_results_all, glue("{output_folder}/{file_name}_xgb_results_all.rds"))

  xgb_metrics_long <- xgb_results_all %>%
    mutate(metrics = purrr::map(metrics, ~ as_tibble(.x))) %>%
    tidyr::unnest(metrics)

  readr::write_csv(xgb_metrics_long, glue("{output_folder}/{file_name}_xgb_metrics_summary.csv"))

  message(glue("{file_name} processing completed."))
}

message("All files processed successfully.")

```
